response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks proven executive-level leadership, formal project management experience, and crucially, only has basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for the role. His architectural and UML experience is implied but not explicitly demonstrated.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern technologies including TypeScript, Node.js, and Linux
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, especially in GIS and DLang ecosystems
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops, talks, and team infrastructure
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required)
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or requirements management experience
Lacks demonstrated experience in client advisory, technical assessment of incoming requests, or team leadership at executive level
